issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (checking Life cards in hand/attached to Leader), not 'TurnCount'. TurnCount is for turn number, not Life card count.

Action type 'AttachDon' attaches DON from external source. Card text says 'give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader' — this means transferring/moving an existing rested DON card. Should use 'GiveDon' or clarify source. If the rested DON comes from your board, this needs a different action structure or explicit source.
